rulings.Case Title: THOMAS RUBINO et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Further Deposition Of E.I. Du Pont De Nemours And Companys Person Most Knowledgeable-Custodian Of Records And Production Of Documents And Things
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, May 25, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the further deposition of E.I. Du Pont De Nemours and Company¿s person most knowledgeable-custodian of records is continued to June 7, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 220 per agreement of the parties. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: CORNELIUS MURPHY et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs' Motion To Compel The Depositions Of Defendant Svi Corporation'S Person Most Knowledgeable And Custodian Of Records And Request For Production Of Documents
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, May 25, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the depositions of defendant SVI Corporation¿s PMK and COR and production of documents is continued to June 14, 2011 per agreement of the parties. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To General Order 129 Standard Plaintiff Interrogatories To Defendants
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, May 25, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel annual responses to General Order 129 standard plaintiffs¿ interrogatories from defendants is taken off calendar by the court. In a complex case, a plaintiff must bring a separate motion to compel for each defendant. A plaintiff cannot bring a single motion to compel that pertains to more than one defendant. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Edward B. Ward And Company¿S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Restricting Defendant¿S Discovery Responses To General Order 129 Standard Interrogatories
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, May 25, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Edward B. Ward and Co.¿s motion for protective order restricting defendant¿s discovery responses to General Order 129 standard interrogatories is off calendar as moot given the court¿s tentative ruling on plaintiffs¿ motion to compel. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder Of Plaintiffs Represented By Harowitz Tigerman, Llp In Plaintiffs Motion To Compel The Annual Update To Response To General Order 129 Standard Plaintiffs Interrogatories From Defendant 84 Lumber Company
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, May 25, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Harowitz & Tigerman, LLP¿s joinder in plaintiffs¿ motion to compel annual responses to General Order 129 standard plaintiffs¿ interrogatories from defendant 84 Lumber Company is off calendar at the request of the moving party. = (220/HEK)
